name: Nimbalyst Memory
description: Local project-knowledge + facts brain. Indexes your markdown (design docs, plans, CLAUDE.md, trackers, voice-memory) into a rebuildable shadow index and serves fast hybrid retrieval + facts to AI agents over MCP. Voice-agent grounding lands in a later phase.
author: Nimbalyst

enablement.purpose: Index this project's Markdown locally for keyword search. Semantic matching is used when an optional embedding provider is already configured.

marketplace.tagline: A local project brain for your AI agents
